content.en:
Liulizong.

Xuangang True Ancestor was still worried, he was afraid that the news of the boundary stone would be exposed.

Although the people of the Dark Temple don't know the value of the boundary stone, they shouldn't say that the boundary stone is in the Liuli Sect, but it is difficult to guarantee that those upper Triple Heaven forces don't know the value of the boundary stone.

Once there is no boundary stone in the body of the boundary beast, then they will inevitably investigate, and it is easy to investigate the Liuli Sect.

The value of the boundary stone is so great that it is enough to make many Upper Triple Heaven forces feel tempted to make a move against the Liuli Sect.

But even if the Liuli Sect chooses again, they will still take away the boundary stone of the Dark Temple, and no force is willing to give up such a treasure.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

The space where the Liuli Sect was located was torn apart, and figures emerged one after another.

Most of these people were wearing armor and masks, and they had suddenly appeared in the vicinity, and they could not be traced.

True Ancestor!

True Ancestor!

All of them are True Ancestors!

Moreover, the aura of many True Ancestors was extremely powerful, and they were the strongest True Ancestors, and the number of top True Ancestors was also tens of thousands, or even more.

Not to mention the elite True Ancestors and ordinary True Ancestors, which almost reached as many as half a million.

Ordinary forces simply can't send such a lineup!

"Upper Triple Heaven Force!"

Xuangang True Ancestor sensed the breath of these True Ancestors, and trembled all over, finally worrying about something happened.

"Who are you?"

Xuangang True Ancestor conjured a giant face with the power of rules, appearing above the mountain gate, questioning the True Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain.

The bloody general said coldly: "Black Wind Mountain!"

The robbery of Black Wind Mountain never conceals its identity, unless it is a special time, but a mere Liuli Sect is not qualified to let Black Wind Mountain hide its identity.

"What, Black Wind Mountain!!"

Xuangang True Ancestor was shocked.

Black Wind Mountain's reputation in the domain realm is not very good, and it is very bold, I don't know how many forces have been robbed of the resources, and even the Triple Heaven forces will not let go.

But the key is that many forces can't do anything about Black Wind Mountain at all, at most they can kill a few Black Wind Mountain Peak Masters and True Ancestors.

Xuangang True Ancestor knew very well that the Liuli Sect was an ant compared to Black Wind Mountain.

Even if the Dao Ancestors hadn't completely recovered, these True Ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain alone were enough to easily sweep the Liuli Sect.

"I don't know why the true ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain came to our Liuli Sect?"

Xuangang True Ancestor pretended not to know and asked.

"Where's the boundary stone, hand it over!"

The bloody general said indifferently.

"What boundary stones? Your Excellency is really joking, how can our Liuli Sect have any boundary stones!"

Xuangang True Ancestor pretended not to know.

It was impossible for him to hand over the boundary stone, otherwise, once the Dao Ancestors woke up, they would definitely not spare him.

The boundary stone is too important to the Liuli Sect, and it is the hope of the rise of the Liuli Sect.

"If you don't pay, then destroy the sect!"

The bloody general threatened.

Black Wind Mountain has never been a decent force, unless it is a force that has a relationship with the top leaders of Black Wind Mountain, Black Wind Mountain will not threaten and exterminate it.

But the Liuli Sect does not have a strong person in the top level of the Black Wind Mountain, so the Black Wind Mountain does not need to care about the mystery of the Liuli Sect, even if the Liuli Sect is destroyed, it is nothing.

"Ladies and gentlemen of the Black Wind Mountain, our Liuli Sect is a five-heaven force, if it really attacks our Liuli Sect, the Dao Ancestors of our Liuli Sect will awaken at all costs and forcibly bombard you. Are you really fighting to the death with our Liuli Sect for a trumped-up boundary stone?" asked Xuangang True Ancestor.

"Kill!"

The bloody general didn't want to talk nonsense, and he didn't want to delay time, in case the other Upper Triple Heaven forces came, it would be troublesome.

Although before he arrived, he used a secret treasure to block the fluctuations in the space of the Liuli Sect, even if he fought, it was difficult for the outside world to know, but with the passage of time, he would definitely not be able to hide it.

The other Upper Triple Heaven forces will definitely be able to find out that the boundary stone is in the Liuli Sect soon, and they will also kill the Liuli Sect at all costs.

At that time, Black Wind Mountain will have to confront the other Upper Triple Heaven forces.

Any of the Upper Triple Heaven forces are not weak, even if they are the Seventh Heaven Force and the Eightfold Heaven Force, the strength of both sides is only one of the strongest is the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and the strongest one is the Eightfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

But at the level of True Ancestor, some of the Sevenfold Heavenly Forces were stronger than the Eightfold Heavenly Forces.

Besides, Black Wind Mountain has also suffered heavy losses at the level of True Ancestors, and some True Ancestors of the Upper Triple Heaven Force are really stronger than Black Wind Mountain.

Therefore, once it encounters the true ancestors of the other Upper Triple Heaven forces, even if Black Wind Mountain can win, it will be a terrible price.

"Speed up and quickly destroy the Liuli Sect!"

The bloody general ordered.

Thundered!!!!

Hundreds of thousands of True Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain shot out in unison, instantly tearing apart the Mountain Gate Great Array of the Liuli Sect, causing cracks to appear in the Mountain Gate Great Array.

Under the rounds of attacks, the mountain gate array of the Liuli Sect was completely shattered without the urging of the Dao Ancestor.

Suddenly, the fight began.

"True Ancestors of the Dark God Temple, you must also take action, otherwise when the True Ancestors of our Liuli Sect fall, you will not survive!" Xuan Gang True Ancestor said.

The True Ancestors of the Dark God Temple, led by the Fire Cloud True Ancestor, were all helpless to participate in the battle.

Originally, the Dark Temple was destroyed, and they were already extremely sad.

Coupled with the threat of the Void Heaven True Kingdom, they didn't dare to leave the Liuli Sect at all, thinking that under the protection of the Liuli Sect, they would be very safe, and they could completely transform into the true ancestors of the Liuli Sect in the future, and the future would also be very good.

But I never expected that it had only been a long time, and almost not long after the news of the destruction of the Dark God Temple came, the Liuli Sect also had a crisis of extinction.

Moreover, the other party turned out to be for what boundary stone to destroy the Liuli Sect.

Boundary stones, that's not ordinary power stones!

At the beginning, the Dark God Temple gave all the boundary stones to the Liuli Sect, I thought it was not a good thing, but I didn't expect such a thing to make the Liuli Sect provoke a great enemy, which shows the preciousness of the boundary stones.

But now it's too late, they are already tied to the Liuli Sect and can't be separated anymore.

In this battle, if they lose, they will inevitably fall, and only by joining forces with the Liuli Sect against Black Wind Mountain can they have a chance of survival.

But in the face of dozens of Supreme True Ancestors, a large number of top True Ancestors, they really couldn't see much hope.

"Kill!"

The True Ancestors of the Dark Temple rushed forward, like moths to a fire, fighting with the True Ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

Battles spread all over the space of the Liuli Sect, and a large number of True Ancestors fell at every moment.

The True Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain have also fallen, but their numbers are relatively small.

Ye Tian also made a move, almost with all his strength, a doorway technique was unleashed, and he killed one True Ancestor after another, even if the top True Ancestor was in his hands, it could be killed within ten moves.

Soon.

More than half of the True Ancestors of the Liuli Sect and the Dark God Temple have fallen, while the number of True Ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain has fallen is very small and almost negligible.

That's when it happened.

A terrifying aura suddenly erupted from the mountain gate of the Liuli Sect, which was not the breath of the True Ancestor, but the breath that belonged to the Dao Ancestor.

"There is a Dao Ancestor forcibly reviving and awakening!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

Moreover, the awakened Dao Ancestor was not an ordinary Dao Ancestor, he was definitely a powerful Dao Ancestor above the Dual Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

After all, the Blood Demon General was an invincible True Ancestor, and his combat power was comparable to that of an ordinary Dual Heavenly Dao Ancestor, if he only revived a Dual Heavenly Dao Ancestor, it would be useless at all.

"It's a Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor!

The bloody general spoke.

"What, Fourfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, Blood Demon General, can we withstand it?"

Ye Tianchuanyin asked.

"Rest assured, if the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor dares to forcibly recover at this time, it will definitely be suppressed by the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm to the point that it can only exert the strength of the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and the state will continue to decline, and eventually fall to the level of the True Ancestor. It seems that there are many, many boundary stones in the Liuli Sect, so many that the Liuli Sect is willing to sacrifice a Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor!"

The bloody general explained.

Ye Tian also nodded, if it wasn't too valuable, how could the Liuli Sect be willing to sacrifice a Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor!

After all, the Liuli Sect itself is also a five-fold heavenly force, at most there are a few five-fold heavenly dao ancestors, and the number of fourfold heavenly dao ancestors is definitely not much, and it is estimated that there are only about a dozen.

Therefore, any Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor is a top-notch existence for the Fivefold Heaven forces, and the high-level among the high-level will not give up easily.

With such a Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, losing one is a huge loss!

"You continue to kill the true ancestor of the Liuli Sect, and I will stop this fourfold Heavenly Dao ancestor who is about to recover!"

"Yes!"

The many true ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain answered one by one.
